transcript: I have no idea what you're saying. Would you spell that out?
Listen, mister... I don't-- '[beep]' --know who you are or what you want... I didn't order any cookies from anybody, and I don't want to see you on my property, is that clear?
'[beep]' --You come by, and I'll run you off the place...!
'[beep]' You better not! I... you better not bring anything out here, or--
I didn't order any exotic potion cookies.
I don't know what you're talking about.
I am not paying nothin', I didn't order nothin'!
I DIDN'T MAKE NO FUCKIN' ORDER, BUD... BUDDY!
You're not BRINGING it on out!
What in the hell are you talking about?
[in background] Rich, what are you talking about?
You're not bringing SHIT to me, buddy! I said, what are you talking about?
I'll tell you what, buddy! You've got about five seconds to tell me what the fuck is going on, or I'm callin' the goddamn cops!
Just a minute... [to someone in the background] Did you order cookies?
What the hell are you talking about?
Who ordered an exotic lotion cake?
I did not order a package.
Do you have something in writing?
